title: Trilegal, K&L Gates, Baker & McKenzie, AZB act on Wipro's $375 million acquisition of Mindsprint from Olam
description: Olam Group Limited has sold off its entire (100%) shareholding in Mindsprint Pte. Ltd. to Wipro Networks Pte. Ltd., a subsidiary of Wipro Limited for $375 million.Trilegal acted as the lead transaction counsel for the Olam Group and was involved in negotiating and finalising the Share Purchase Agreement and all ancillary transaction documents.
